name: Moon and Homeland
title: Moon and Homeland
desc:
"My moon, my beloved song,
abandon me not in this dark night.
My little doves, bring from that golden city
the song of my homeland."

skills.desc:
After you play the next card in this Round: At the start of the next Round, create 1 card that has been played and add it to your Hand.
(You must have at least 2 Nod-Krai characters in your deck to add this card to your deck)
